features.title: Codex adversarial review + fix findings
steps: Codex adversarial review has been run
All BLOCKING/HIGH findings fixed or documented as acceptable

features.title: README + CLAUDE.md alignment
steps: README commands table matches actual command files on disk
README install section matches current install.sh/bat behavior
README architecture tree matches actual file structure
CLAUDE.md naming conventions table matches actual enums
CLAUDE.md scripts architecture matches actual subcommands

features.title: Script cleanup
steps: No unused imports in any .mjs file
No stale comments referencing removed features
